title: arctium × mixtum
intro: Arctium × mixtum, also known as the bur marigold, is a hybrid plant species of the thistle family (Asteraceae), resulting from the cross between the lesser burdock (Arctium minus) and the greater burdock (Arctium lappa). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Arctium × mixtum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments such as arthritis, colds, and fever. Arctium × mixtum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as dried roots and leaves that can be used in capsules or powder form.
